data.title: Coinbase to launch prediction markets and tokenized equities, competing with Kalshi and Polymarket. Combined monthly volumes rose to $7.7B in Nov from $1.3B in Aug.
data.description: Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) is reportedly set to introduce prediction markets and tokenized equities next week, as its stock trades lower within a larger downtrend. A source familiar with the matter mentioned that Coinbase is internally developing the tokenized equities offering, without any external partners. The company's spokesperson encouraged viewers to watch a livestream on Dec. 17 for further information but did not confirm specific product details. Recent screenshots circulating online displayed early versions of these features within the Coinbase app, fueling speculation leading up to the launch event. This move aligns Coinbase with other prominent cryptocurrency platforms venturing into prediction markets. Kalshi and Polymarket currently lead the sector, with their combined monthly volumes increasing to about $7.7 billion in November from approximately $1.3 billion in August. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sinners and Frankenstein lead the 2025 Astra Creative Arts Film Awards, while The Pitt wins big at the TV awards.71-character summary.
data.description: Tonight, in Burbank, CA, the Hollywood Creative Alliance (HCA) recognized the victorious recipients of the 2025 Astra Creative Arts Awards during a ceremony at Castaway Burbank. This event paid tribute to the talented individuals who excelled in their respective fields, showcasing their exceptional skills. The prestigious awards ceremony highlighted the achievements of these artisans in the creative arts industry.

data.title: Florida confiscates $1.5M in cryptocurrencies including Dogecoin, Pepe, and Solana linked to fraud case involving a Chinese national.
data.description: Authorities utilized a fugitive disentitlement statute to confiscate Dogecoin, Solana, and various other tokens linked to a fraud case in Citrus County.

data.title: Sobi gets positive CHMP opinion for Aspaveli® for C3G and Primary IC-MPGN. 8,000 people in Europe affected. 1st treatment option for patients 12+.
data.description: Sobi® (STO: SOBI) has revealed that around 8,000 individuals in Europe are currently affected by C3G or primary IC-MPGN. If Aspaveli (pegcetacoplan) receives approval, it will mark the inaugural treatment available for C3G and primary IC-MPGN patients aged 12 and above. The announcement was made in Stockholm on December 12, 2025.

data.title: Amazon Teamsters and officials rally at DBK1 Facility in Queens, demanding union recognition for 200+ workers.
data.description: In New York on December 12, 2025, a rally will be held at 10:30 a.m. Eastern Time outside Amazon's DBK1 Facility in Woodside, Queens. The event organized by Amazon Teamsters and supported by elected officials aims to urge Amazon to acknowledge the Teamsters Union as the negotiating body for over 200 employees at DBK1.

data.title: Equity problem arises.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that a record number of 1,500 new COVID-19 cases have been confirmed within the past 24 hours. The surge in infections brings the total number of cases in the country to approximately 25,000. Additionally, there has been a significant increase in the number of hospitalizations, with 200 new patients admitted for treatment. This uptick in cases has led to concerns about the strain on the healthcare system and calls for stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and regulations to help mitigate the impact of the pandemic.

data.title: PacketWatch assists organizations recover from React2Shell attacks with proactive threat hunting. (Character count: 97)
data.description: A press release from Phoenix on December 12, 2025, highlights the effectiveness of proactive threat hunting in identifying suspicious network activities that might go unnoticed by others. The React2Shell vulnerability has posed challenges for organizations, leading PacketWatch threat hunters to release a blog post titled "Responding to..." to provide insights. This approach has proven valuable in detecting anomalies and potential threats, emphasizing the critical importance of vigilance in cybersecurity.

data.title: Hozpitality Group recognizes leaders in Middle East's hospitality sector at the 11th Excellence Awards.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on December 12, 2025, Hozpitality Group organized the 11th Middle East Hospitality Excellence Awards and GM Powerlist 2025 at Arabian Ranches Golf Club. The ceremony celebrated exceptional leaders, up-and-coming talents, and top teams in the hospitality industry of the region. The prestigious event showcased the achievements and contributions of individuals and groups in this sector.

data.title: Flowserve Corp. (NYSE: FLS) to pay $0.21/share quarterly dividend, payable Jan 9, 2026, to shareholders as of Dec 26, 2025.
data.description: Dallas-based Flowserve Corporation, a prominent provider of flow control products and services worldwide, has disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.21 per share for its outstanding common stock (NYSE: FLS). The dividend, approved by the Board of Directors, will be paid out on January 9, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 26, 2025. This move aligns with Flowserve's commitment to regular quarterly dividend payouts.

data.title: UK lawmakers caution against Bank of England stablecoin plans, fearing they could push innovation overseas.
data.description: A group of MPs and House of Lords members from different political parties have come together to call on UK Chancellor Rachel Reeves to restrict the Bank of England's plan for regulating systemic stablecoins.

data.title: Cherry Hill Mortgage Investment Corp (NYSE: CHMI) declared $0.10/share dividend on common stock for Q4 2025. DIV: $0.5125 on preferred.
data.description: TINTON FALLS, N.J.-- Cherry Hill Mortgage Investment Corporation (NYSE: CHMI) has declared a dividend of $0.10 per share on its common stock for Q4 2025. The dividend will be paid on January 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 31, 2025. Moreover, the Board of Directors also approved a dividend of $0.5125 per share on [additional info or stock]

data.title: Sintana Energy Inc. completes acquisition of Challenger, getting court sanction for the scheme of arrangement.
data.description: Sintana Energy Inc. (TSX-V: SEI, OTCQX: SEUSF) has successfully acquired Challenger, with the approval of the TSXV, following a recommended acquisition announced on October 9, 2025. The acquisition of the entire issued and to be issued ordinary share capital of Challenger was completed through a Court-sanctioned scheme of arrangement under the Isle of Man Companies Act 1931. This deal marks an important milestone for both companies, with Sintana confirming the satisfaction of the TSXV Condition for closing the acquisition.

data.title: Mike Novak, LSRP, named to Governor-elect Mikie Sherrill's task force; top "Environmental Influencer" in NJ. J.S. Held firm.
data.description: Mike Novak, a Licensed Site Remediation Professional (LSRP), has been acknowledged as one of the top "Environmental Influencers" in New Jersey by ROI-NJ. He is the sole LSRP to receive this recognition. The announcement was made on December 12, 2025, in Jericho, NY. J.S. Held, a global consulting firm, proudly appointed Novak to this esteemed position.

data.title: NeuraLight gains prominent scientific leaders, including Nobel Prize winner Prof. Thomas Südhof and neurologist Prof. Olivier Rascol, to advance disease progression measurement in neurology.
data.description: NeuraLight, a company specializing in precision biomarkers for neurological diseases, has added esteemed Nobel Prize-winning neuroscientist Prof. Thomas Südhof to its Scientific Advisory Board. Prof. Südhof, a renowned researcher in Alzheimer's disease, joins the board along with distinguished neurologist Prof. Olivier Rascol, who played a key role in developing the current gold standard for assessing Parkinson's disease. Based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, Austin, Texas, and Tel Aviv, Israel, NeuraLight continues to expand its expertise with these influential additions to its team.
